name: archery-note
description: Archery scoring, sight adjustment, and equipment notebook with a native-ready shell.

scripts.check:all: npm run check:app && npm run check:ui && npm run check:pwa && npm run check:storage && npm run check:version
scripts.native:sync: npm run build:native-web && npx cap sync
scripts.native:sync:android: npm run build:native-web && npx cap sync android
scripts.native:open:android: npm run native:sync:android && npx cap open android
scripts.native:build:android: npm run native:sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.native:add:android: npm run build:native-web && npx cap add android
scripts.native:add:ios: npm run build:native-web && npx cap add ios
